# Subscriptions.IsAbsoluteUri method

Returns `true` when *value* is an absolute URI string [RFC3986] — a scheme followed by `:` and at least one further character (§10.2, R-10.2-i). A relative reference (no scheme) is rejected.

```csharp
public static bool IsAbsoluteUri(string? value)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| value | The candidate URI. |

## Return Value

`true` when it is an absolute URI.
